2.text: Case No: ENF 012/2009 THE JUDICIAL AUTHORITY OF THE DUBAI INTERNATIONAL FINANCIAL CENTRE IN THE COURT OF FIRST INSTANCE Between

3.text:
SHEREEN ALDISIJudgment Creditor
And ORION HOLDING OVERSEAS LIMITEDJudgment Debtor

4.text: ORDER This application been called for hearing (as a return date for third party debt order) on this day before Honorable Judge Ali Al Madhani AND UPON the hearing IT IS ORDERED THAT:

5.text:
1. The Judgment Debtor to make a payment into the DIFC Courts' account the sum of AED   
71,187 pending Court further order.

6.text: 2. The third party debt order issued on 5 August 2009 to be discharged after the transfer of the sum is made into the Courts' account.

7.text: 3. The parties are at liberty to submit such further applications and documents to the Court as they consider appropriate.

8.text: Ali Al Madhani Enforcement Judge Date of Issue: 3 September 2009 At: 2pm
